name: Infused Oils- Szechwan Peppercorn Oil "China Moon
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Scallions, green & white, cut in rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over moderate heat until hot enough to evaporate a bead of water on contact.
2. Add the Szechwan peppercorns and stir until toasted and fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes. Adjust the heat so the peppercorns brown without scorching.
3. Combine the toasted peppercorns and all remaining ingredients in a heavy, non-aluminum saucepan measuring 1 to 1 1/2 quarts.
4. Place a deep-fry thermometer on the rim of the pot.
5. Over moderately low heat, bring the mixture to a bubbly temperature of 225°F, stirring occasionally.
6. Let simmer for 15 minutes, checking to ensure the temperature does not rise above 225°F. Remove from the heat and let stand until cool or overnight.
7. Strain the oil through a fine-mesh sieve and discard the solids.
8. Store the oil in an impeccably clean glass jar at cool room temperature.
This oil is particularly good for salads. Its herbal quality also makes it a nice partner to poultry or beef dishes.
